description_long: This hoverboard features a compact, symmetrical design with a vibrant graffiti-style pattern covering its entire exterior. It has two large, rubberized wheels on either side, each with a metallic hubcap and visible tread for traction. The footpads are black, rectangular, and slightly raised, providing a textured, grippy surface for secure footing. The central body is slightly arched, connecting the two wheel housings, and appears to be made of durable plastic with internal metal reinforcement. No visible lighting elements, control interfaces, or brand logos are present on the exterior. The overall look is modern and urban, suitable for personal transportation in city environments.
description: A graffiti-patterned hoverboard with large side wheels, black textured footpads, and a sleek, arched plastic body.
description_view_0: Side view showing both large wheels, the arched body, and the full graffiti pattern with black footpads on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting one wheel with a metallic hubcap, the rounded wheel housing, and the edge of the footpad.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with both wheels and the graffiti pattern visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the other wheel, its hubcap, and the back edge of the footpad.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels on either side, each with a metallic hubcap and visible tread; wheels are of equal size and symmetrically placed.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular black footpads, one on each side of the central arch, with a textured, grippy surface for traction; slightly raised edges for foot security; likely contains pressure sensors beneath the surface.
